titleStmt.title: SII 9.339: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 339. (A.R. No. 281 of 1918.) ON A SLAB LYING IN A FIELD TO THE SOUTH OF ANIJIGERE, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1145, Chitrabhānu, Pushya, ba. 8, Sōmavāra, Uttarāyaṇa saṅkramaṇa, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1222, December 28, Monday, on which day the tithi commenced after ·52; the Śaka year was current. The inscription refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Nārasiṁhadēva. When his Mahāpradhāna Ammaṇṇa-Daṇṇāyaka was administering all the dēśas, the latter's subordinate, Asagōḍa Pallava-Sāvanta of the Sonda-kula, who was the Māhānāḷprabhu of the Sāviranāḍu made a gift of some plots of land (specified) for the service of the god Kalidēva in the village Kūchigōḷa, which was situated in Uchchaṅgi thirty. Both Ammaṇṇa and Asagōḍa Pallava are said to have been great warriors.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē traiḷōkyanagarārambha(ṁ)mūlastaṁ
bhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ dvāra
vatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yādavakuḷāṁbaradyumaṇi
sarvvajñacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja malaparo
ḷugaṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍanasahāya
śūranēkāṁgavīra śanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla ca
ladaṁkarāma magararājyanirmūḷanuṁ pāṁḍyarājya
diśāpaṭanuṁ cōḷurājyapratiṣṭhācāryya
nissaṁkapratāpacakravartti hoyisaṇa śrīvī
ranārasiṁ2hadēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
vardhdhamānamāge yācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttami
re tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sa
rvvādhikāri mahāpasāyitaṁ paramaviśvāsi rāyadaṇḍanā
tha Aṁmaṇnadaṇnāyakaru samastarājyabharanirūpasamudhdha
raṇaduṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ samastadēśādhikāraṁ māḍu
ttavire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samastavasudhātaḷaprakhyātanuṁ
satkulōdbhūtanuṁ soṁdakulakamaḷamārttaṁḍanuṁ nuḍidaṁte
gaṁḍanuṁ Uccaṁgīdēviya labdhavaraprasādādhipatyanuṁ musuva
rādityanuṁ maṟevugekāvanuṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaranuṁ Asaṁ
khyātamāhēśvaragaṇakumāranuṁ śrīsvayambhudēvara di
vyaśrīpādapadmārādhakaṁ sāviranāḍa śrīmanumahānāḷpra
bhu Asagōḍa pallavasāvantanu Uccaṁgi mūvattaṟoḷu
taṁna prabhuttikeya kūcigōḷada mūlasthāna kalidēva
nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōdhdhārakkaṁ biṭṭa
datti sakavarṣada 1145 neya citrabhānusaṁvatsarada puśya bahu
ḷa Aṣṭamī sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramāṇa vyatīpātadoḷu
biṭṭa bhūmi hiriyake ṁbinagadde paḍu
vaṇa haḷugu sahita kaṁma cikka
tōṭade gadde kaṁmaviṁnūṟu 200 ḷage
mūṟu mattaru ma 3 dēvara muṁdaṇa
mani ciṁcimeyana kaṭṭiyali rāvagaṭṭada dā
ṇa mattareraḍu ma 2 maṁ śivatīrtthada nīrubhūmi kīḷubhūmi
sahita svasti yamaniyamadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānaja
pasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpaṁnarappa Āḷuvapaṁḍitara mamma kēśavarā
japaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭanintī dharmmama
nāru pratipālisidaḍaṁ vāraṇāsiyalu yēḷunūṟu
manuśya sacrāhmaṇarigēḷunūṟu kavileya sadakṣiṇe sahi
ta dānamāḍida phalamakku Iṁtī dharmmamanāru keḍisidaḍaṁ vāra
ṇāsiyalēḷnūṟu manuśya brāhmaṇaranū yēḷnūṟu
kavileyanū koṁda dōṣamakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.339 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
